prompt: Generate a grayscale depth map visualization of a scene with multiple elements at varying distances. Use the strong foreground focus concept from image 1, applied to a multi-subject arrangement inspired by image 2, clearly showing near and far areas.
prompt_refined: Generate a grayscale depth map visualization depicting multiple distinct human subjects. The composition should exhibit a strong foreground depth effect, similar to the clear subject-background separation and shallow depth of field observed in image 1, but applied to an arrangement of several people, drawing inspiration from the multi-subject layout of image 2. Ensure subjects are positioned at clearly differentiated depths, ranging from immediate foreground to distant background, to distinctly illustrate near and far areas within the scene.
objects: Human subject in the immediate foreground
Human subject in the distant background
Visual representation of near depth areas
Visual representation of far depth areas
Clear depth separation between subjects and background
Varying grayscale values representing depth differences
